overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow aerial pan across a rain-soaked, neon-lit dystopian cityscape at night. The camera drifts past towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and crisscrossing power lines, capturing the atmospheric haze and vibrant cyan and magenta lighting of the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop overlook of neon-lit downtown district

agents.ego_description: drifting slowly at high vantage point, panning view across the cyberpunk cityscape from right to left

entered.detail: Industrial air conditioning units mounted on building exterior in the immediate foreground
Tall glass building with prominent vertical cyan neon lighting and corporate signage
Dense network of black power lines and cables crisscrossing between buildings
Large floating holographic advertisement visible in the distant city haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high-angle view of a cyberpunk city at night, with industrial AC units in the left foreground and a towering neon-lit skyscraper dominating the right side. Overhead cables crisscross the frame while distant vehicle lights move along the streets below through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban core with elevated transit infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing slow leftward pan, revealing the central district with large advertising structures

entered.detail: Massive cylindrical billboard structure with multiple illuminated advertisement screens rotating slowly
Tall smokestack emitting white smoke into the night sky

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the tall neon skyscraper moves out of frame while a massive cylindrical holographic billboard structure comes into view on the left. An industrial smokestack becomes visible in the center distance, and the AC units drift toward the left edge of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with heavy advertising and transit lines

agents.ego_description: completing the leftward pan across the cityscape, focusing on the large billboard and distant skyline

entered.detail: Elevated monorail or train track structure running horizontally across the middle distance
Modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera centers on the massive rotating billboard while the foreground AC units exit the frame. An elevated transit track becomes visible in the middle distance, and the view opens toward a different cluster of glass towers on the right as the pan completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-angle aerial pan across a rain-soaked dystopian cityscape, shifting focus from a dominant neon skyscraper to a massive holographic billboard. It begins with a view of industrial AC units in the foreground and a towering lit tower to the right, while overhead cables and distant vehicle lights cut through the atmospheric haze. As the camera pans left, the skyscraper slides out of frame to reveal a cylindrical holographic structure and a distant industrial smokestack. The scene then opens further as the AC units drift away, centering on the rotating billboard while an elevated transit track emerges in the middle distance. Finally, the movement concludes by unveiling a new cluster of glass towers on the right, completing the sweep of the neon-lit urban horizon.
